summary: Parallel review: FAIL (13 critical, 5 warning, 5 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: рџџЎ compound-gate.mjs:0 вЂ” Thin review warning: fabricated-refs
- `test/flows.test.mjs:276-288` directly tests "simplicity рџ”ґ causes FAIL even when all other roles pass with no criticals"
- `bin/lib/run.mjs:1307-1308,1342-1345` joins all role outputs, runs `computeVerdict`, and any рџ”ґ flips `reviewFailed=true` вЂ” role-agnostic by construction
- `test/flows.test.mjs:276-289` directly asserts simplicity рџ”ґ + architect рџ”µ + engineer "No findings." в†’ `verdict === "FAIL"`
- `bin/lib/flows.mjs:188` вЂ” critical simplicity в†’ `[simplicity veto]`; рџџЎ/рџ”µ stay `[simplicity]`
- `bin/lib/run.mjs:1307-1344` вЂ” multi-review joins all role outputs, runs `computeVerdict`, any рџ”ґ в†’ `reviewFailed`/FAIL
- `test/flows.test.mjs:276-289` вЂ” explicitly asserts simplicity рџ”ґ + others рџ”µ/none в†’ FAIL

рџџЎ test/flows.test.mjs:367 вЂ” Add a regression test for whitespace-only output (e.g., `evaluateSimplicityOutput("   \n")`) вЂ” current code returns PASS instead of SKIP, exactly the "false PASS" failure mode the handshake claims to fix.

Verdict path verified: `run.mjs:1307-1308` joins all role outputs and runs `parseFindings` + `computeVerdict`; a simplicity рџ”ґ traverses the identical path as any other role's рџ”ґ в†’ `FAIL`. Test at `flows.test.mjs:276-289` confirms (47/47 pass).

No user input, auth, secrets, PII, or network I/O introduced. The `[simplicity veto]` label is display-only and cannot mask the verdict (raw рџ”ґ still parsed). Log-injection risk from agent output is consistent with existing review paths вЂ” not a new attack surface.
- рџџЎ bin/lib/flows.mjs:210 вЂ” `evaluateSimplicityOutput` has a single production call site; fold SKIP guard back inline if a second consumer doesn't materialize.
- рџџЎ bin/lib/run.mjs:1284-1288 вЂ” `reviewRounds` re-read/write block duplicated at run.mjs:1238, 1287, 1350; extract helper next time touched.
- Multi-review path joins outputs and runs `computeVerdict` (run.mjs:1299-1306), so any рџ”ґ в†’ FAIL.
- Test at `flows.test.mjs:276-289` asserts the exact "simplicity рџ”ґ + other roles рџ”µ/none в†’ FAIL" scenario.

No veto categories (dead code / premature abstraction / unnecessary indirection / gold-plating) trigger рџ”ґ вЂ” the new helper introduces a genuine third verdict (`SKIP`) and is not a pure delegate. Eval written to `.team/features/simplicity-reviewer-with-veto/tasks/task-2/eval-simplicity.md`.
